segments.text: Neutral B connects for the KO!
The match is picking up pace again
segments.original_text: 試合がまたも早く動きます

segments.text: From the turnaround nair, if it catches, Young Link's got the offense
segments.original_text: 反転から空中Nで絡んだら今度はキョンリンクの攻めになる
空中前通し切ったその後
ブーメラン空中前通る

segments.text: Not a KO yet, but the pressure's mounting
segments.original_text: まだ撃墜はしないがプレッシャーがかかってくる

full_text: Neutral B connects for the KO! The match is picking up pace again From the turnaround nair, if it catches, Young Link's got the offense After the fair goes through Boomerang fair connects! Not a KO yet, but the pressure's mounting

corrections.original: ハンデから空中に寝たら
corrections.corrected: 反転から空中Nで絡んだら
